## Generation Report

### Source Verification
- Reviewed dali-core, dali-adaptor, and dali-ui repository structures
- Verified architecture from README.md files and public API headers
- Confirmed View class API from view.h

### Content Decisions
- Structured overview around the three-layer architecture (core/adaptor/ui)
- Introduced the View-centric mental model for app developers
- Listed all four layout containers with brief descriptions
- Covered major functional areas: input/focus, animation, theming, images, text, scrolling
- Included one SVG diagram showing the layered architecture

### Links Created
All links reference existing guide files from the provided source map:
- view.md, layouts.md, visuals.md, text.md, ui-color-manager.md
- interactive-view.md, focus-manager.md, view-state.md
- animation.md, ui-color.md
- image-view.md, animated-image-view.md, lottie-animation-view.md
- label.md, input-field.md, scroll-view.md

### Constraints Met
- No code blocks or C++ examples included
- No Mermaid diagrams used
- One small SVG included for architecture visualization
- No promotional language; objective description of framework characteristics
- No references to pipeline internals, cache files, or local paths
- English and Korean versions use identical link targets and SVG path
